title: Community Heap
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Community Heap''' was a pile of scavenged items gathered by a community of [[Jenet/Legends|Jenet]]. Each Jenet in the community would contribute things it scavenged. Community Heaps were administered by the community's government and often included discarded food, broken tools, and household goods.
